raw_consumer_statement: As an XXXX spouse so this has been a nightmare for our family. On or around XXXX XXXX someone kept using my best buy Citi bank card and kept making unauthorized transactions. Best Buy supposedly investigated and I am somehow on the hook for said items I do not have. I'm stuck paying for a XXXX item. I issued to cancel the card and yet my account was still being used to make more purchases, I believe the last purchase went through for about XXXX bucks. I have already been given XXXX new cards and yet nothing has changed. I have suspicion that someone at the best buy store or maybe online some how got ahold of my account because how can I be at work and at Best buy store at the same time. Just about XXXX weeks ago Best Buy sent me a new card again, not sure where to go from here.
